title: pelargonium × tibbitsianum
intro: Pelargonium × tibbitsianum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Geraniaceae family, derived from the cross between Pelargonium graveolens and Pelargonium capitatum. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which is rich in geraniol and linalool, compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting better sleep, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as its potential to support digestive health and immune function. Rose Geranium is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oil blends, which can be applied topically or inhaled to harness its therapeutic effects.
